name: Grilled Chicken Dijon Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, skinned, boned and fat removed
8 ounces Fat-free Muenster Cheese, H.C., cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together mustard, tarragon and pepper; stir in vinegar and water.
2. Gradually add oil, beating until well blended.
3. Pour 1/3 cup of dressing mixture over chicken.
4. Marinate mushrooms and broccoli in remaining dressing.
5. Drain chicken, reserving marinade.
6. Grill chicken over medium coals, 4 minutes on each side or to desired doneness, brushing with reserved marinade mixture.
7. Cut chicken into 8 strips.
8. Combine mushrooms, broccoli and marinade (see note) with torn greens and cheese in serving bowl; toss lightly.
9. Arrange lettuce mixture on large platter; top with chicken and onion rings.
